name: Mux
description: Mux provides video infrastructure APIs for uploading, encoding, streaming, and delivering video content. It handles live streaming, on-demand video, and provides playback analytics out of the box.

capabilities.name: create_asset
capabilities.description: Upload and create a new video asset from a URL or direct upload. Mux will automatically transcode it into multiple resolutions for adaptive streaming.

capabilities.name: list_assets
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all video assets in your Mux environment. Useful for browsing your video library or finding specific assets.

capabilities.name: get_asset
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific video asset including its status, duration, resolution, and playback IDs.

capabilities.name: delete_asset
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a video asset and all of its associated data including transcoded renditions and playback IDs.

capabilities.name: create_live_stream
capabilities.description: Create a new live stream with a stream key. Supports RTMP ingest, automatic recording, and low-latency playback.

capabilities.name: create_playback_id
capabilities.description: Generate a new playback ID for an asset or live stream. Playback IDs can be public or signed for secure access.

capabilities.name: create_direct_upload
capabilities.description: Create a direct upload URL that allows clients to upload video files directly to Mux without proxying through your server.
